ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale transaction */,
  "date_block_num" INTEGER /* Block number representing the time period of the sale */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shop where the sale occurred */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being sold */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of sale */,
  "item_cnt_day" INTEGER /* Count of items sold on the transaction date */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the promotion applied to the sale */,
  "return_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sale is a return (negative sale) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "shop_name" TEXT /* Name of the shop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the shop */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the shop */,
  "open_date" TEXT /* Date the shop opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the shop closed (if applicable) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the shop */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the shop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shops_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the item belongs */,
  "price" REAL /* Current standard price of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for when to reorder stock */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Default quantity to reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Last date the item was reordered */,
  "last_cost" REAL /* Last cost price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shop where the inventory is tracked */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item in inventory */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the item in the shop */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the inventory was updated */,
  "reorder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reorder (e.g., pending, ordered, received) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item being promoted */,
  "discount_percent" REAL /* Discount percentage offered during the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the promotion */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date for which the report is generated */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shop for the report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales revenue for the report date */,
  "total_items_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of items sold on the report date */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken by the user (e.g., view report, update inventory) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shop where the employee works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
